release: Park et al. 2026 Cassini DE440 quadrupole constraint

citation.title: Improved constraints on modified Newtonian gravity from Cassini radio tracking data

source.title: Gaia Early Data Release 3: Acceleration of the solar system from Gaia astrometry

provenance_note: Values transcribed from the cited paper for a reproducible summary-statistic comparison. The underlying Cassini radiometric observations and orbit-determination likelihood are not bundled.
